scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir client dev" "pnpm --dir server dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir client build" "pnpm --dir server build"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others=false -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir client preview" "pnpm --dir server start"
concurrently "npm run start-backend" "npm run start-frontend" "npm run start-electron"
